name: DataForSEO
description: Comprehensive SEO data via DataForSEO API v3: Google SERPs, keyword research (search volume, ideas, difficulty, overview), competitor analysis, backlinks, on-page audits, Lighthouse scores, domain tech stack and Google My Business. Live endpoints only. Paid API (cost shown per call).

tools.name: dfs_account_balance
tools.description: Show DataForSEO account balance, lifetime spend, and timezone. Free. Use this first to verify credentials work and check budget.

tools.name: dfs_serp_google_organic
tools.description: Fetch Google organic search results (top N) for a keyword in a given location and language. Live, ~$0.002 per call.

tools.name: dfs_serp_google_organic_advanced
tools.description: Like dfs_serp_google_organic but with featured snippets, sitelinks, knowledge graph, People Also Ask. ~$0.002 per call.

tools.name: dfs_search_volume
tools.description: Monthly search volume + CPC + competition for a list of keywords (Google Ads data). ~$0.075 per call regardless of keyword count.

tools.name: dfs_keywords_for_keywords
tools.description: Find related keywords for a seed keyword with their search volume, CPC and competition (Google Ads). ~$0.075 per call.

tools.name: dfs_google_trends
tools.description: Google Trends interest-over-time for one or more keywords in a region and date range.

tools.name: dfs_keyword_overview
tools.description: Full SEO profile of a single keyword: search volume, keyword difficulty, CPC, search intent, SERP features. ~$0.01 per call.

tools.name: dfs_keyword_ideas
tools.description: Semantic keyword ideas from a seed keyword, with metrics. ~$0.011 per call.

tools.name: dfs_keyword_difficulty
tools.description: Bulk keyword difficulty (KD 1-100) for a list of keywords. ~$0.01 per call.

tools.name: dfs_ranked_keywords
tools.description: What keywords does a domain rank for? Returns position, search volume, traffic estimate. ~$0.0105 per call.

tools.name: dfs_competitors_domain
tools.description: Top competing domains for a target domain in the SERPs. ~$0.0105 per call.

tools.name: dfs_backlinks_summary
tools.description: Backlink profile summary for a domain (total backlinks, referring domains, rank, history). REQUIRES a separate Backlinks API subscription on DataForSEO.

tools.name: dfs_backlinks_referring_domains
tools.description: List of domains that link to a target. REQUIRES Backlinks API subscription.

tools.name: dfs_backlinks_anchors
tools.description: Anchor text distribution for a domain's backlinks. REQUIRES Backlinks API subscription.

tools.name: dfs_onpage_instant
tools.description: Live single-page audit: HTTP status, meta tags, on-page issues. Synchronous, ~$0.000125 per call.

tools.name: dfs_lighthouse_audit
tools.description: Lighthouse audit (Performance, Accessibility, SEO, Best Practices, PWA) for a URL. Mobile or desktop. ~$0.00425 per call.

tools.name: dfs_domain_technologies
tools.description: Detected tech stack of a domain (CMS, frameworks, analytics, hosting). ~$0.01 per call.

tools.name: dfs_my_business_info
tools.description: Google My Business listings for a search query in a location. Returns name, address, rating, categories, hours. ~$0.0054 per call.

author: freddy-schuetz
